form.formComment: Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, 9th of 11 at this track on March 4 over 2200m, 39 len behind That's Amore carrying 59.5kg at $151. Not keen on his chances.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 38 days. First-up ran last in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on February 10 over 1600m, 27 len behind Sweet Princess with 59kg at $15. Second-up second last of 11 at this track on March 4 over 2200m, 40 len behind That's Amore with 59.5kg at $151. This looks a stern test.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Lingfield All Weather on March 20 over 2000m, neck behind A Taste Of Glory with 59.5kg at $3.80. The race before that 2nd in a small field at Lingfield All Weather on February 14 over 2000m, 1.0 len behind Into The Light with 60.5kg at $1.30. Went close last time. Winning chance.

form.formComment: First-starter by Dubawi out of Molly Malone. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, 4th in a small field at this track on February 28 over 2200m, 9 len behind Pursuit Of Love carrying 59kg at $8. Last start 2nd of 9 at Doncaster on March 28 over 2000m, 1.5 len behind High Storm with 59kg at $13. Plenty of scope for improvement and sure to measure up.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start of 7 at Newcastle All Weather on December 19 over 1400m, 9 len behind Thestral carrying 60.5kg at $3.80.
